    inner ℝ (pbar.rotM₂φ P) (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc)

failed_attempts: rfl

have h_main : ‖P‖ * nth_partial 1 (fun (x : ℝ²) => rotproj_outer_unit P (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc) x) pbar.outerParams = ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc⟫ := by sorry
  have h_def : GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc = fun (x : ℝ²) => rotproj_outer_unit P (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc) x := by sorry
  have h_final : ‖P‖ * nth_partial 1 (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams = ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc⟫ := by sorry
  exact h_final
  <;> done

have h1 : ‖P‖ * nth_partial 1 (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams = ‖P‖ * (deriv (fun x : ℝ² => (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w x)) (pbar.outerParams)).2 := by
    simp [nth_partial]
    <;> rfl
  rw [h1]
  have h2 : deriv (fun x : ℝ² => (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w x)) (pbar.outerParams) = (⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖, ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖) := by
    have h3 : deriv (fun x : ℝ² => (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w x)) (pbar.outerParams) = (⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖, ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖) := by
      simp [rotproj_outer_unit, inner, rotM, rotM_th, rotM_ph, Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ, Finset.sum_range_succ, Finset.sum_range_zero]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [Fin.sum_univ_succ, Finset.sum_range_succ, Finset.sum_range_zero]) <;>
      (try field_simp [norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, Real.sqrt_nonneg, sq_nonneg]) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try simp_all [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons, Matrix.cons_vec_bit0_eq_alt0, Matrix.cons_vec_bit1_eq_alt1]) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>

      (try

          cases' eq_or_ne (‖P‖ : ℝ) 0 with h h <;>
          simp_all [h, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc]
          <;>
          field_simp [h] <;>
          ring_nf <;>
          simp_all [h] <;>
          linarith
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [Fin.sum_univ_succ, Finset.sum_range_succ, Finset.sum_range_zero]
          <;>
          field_simp [norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, Real.sqrt_nonneg, sq_nonneg] <;>
          ring_nf <;>
          simp_all [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons, Matrix.cons_vec_bit0_eq_alt0, Matrix.cons_vec_bit1_eq_alt1] <;>

      <;>

      <;>

  have h3 : ‖P‖ * (⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖, ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖).2 = ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    by_cases h : ‖P‖ = 0
    · have h4 : P = 0 := by

lemma partials_helper4 {pbar : Pose} {ε : ℝ} {poly : GoodPoly}
    (pc : GlobalTheoremPrecondition poly pbar ε) (P : ℝ³) :
    ‖P‖ * nth_partial 1 (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams =
    ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, pc.w⟫ := by
  sorry

have h : ‖P‖ * nth_partial 1 (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams = ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    simp only [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, InnerProductSpace.toDualMap_smul]
    have h₁ : deriv (fun x : ℝ² => ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, x⟫ / ‖P‖) (pbar.outerParams) = ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, (1 : ℝ²).symm 1⟫ / ‖P‖ := by
      -- Prove that the derivative of the linear function is its coefficient.
      simp [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_div]
      <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try simp_all [InnerProductSpace.linearMap_toDual, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_div]) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try field_simp) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try simp_all [InnerProductSpace.linearMap_toDual, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_div]) <;>
      (try linarith)
    -- Simplify the expression using the properties of the inner product.
    simp_all [nth_partial, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_div]
    <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try simp_all [InnerProductSpace.linearMap_toDual, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_div]) <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try field_simp) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try simp_all [InnerProductSpace.linearMap_toDual, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_div]) <;>
    (try linarith)
  exact h
sorry

have h₁ : (nth_partial 1 (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams : ℝ) = ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    have h₂ : pbar.outerParams.1.2 = (0 : ℝ)
    have h₃ : pbar.outerParams.2.2 = (0 : ℝ)
    have h₄ : pbar.outerParams.1.1 = (0 : ℝ)
    have h₅ : pbar.outerParams.2.1 = (0 : ℝ)
    simp_all [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit]
    <;>
    (try
      norm_num) <;>
    (try
      simp_all [inner, rotM]) <;>
    (try
      ring_nf) <;>
    (try
      field_simp) <;>
    (try
      simp_all [inner, rotM]) <;>
    (try
      ring_nf) <;>
    (try
      norm_num) <;>
    (try
      linarith)
    <;>
    simp_all [inner, rotM]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    norm_num
    <;>
    linarith

  have h₂ : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 → ‖P‖ * (nth_partial 1 (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams : ℝ) = ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    intro h₃
    calc
      ‖P‖ * (nth_partial 1 (GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer P pc) pbar.outerParams : ℝ) = ‖P‖ * (‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, pc.w⟫) := by rw [h₁]
      _ = (‖P‖ * ‖P‖⁻¹) * ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, pc.w⟫ := by ring
      _ = 1 * ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, pc.w⟫ := by field_simp [h₃]
      _ = ⟪pbar.rotM₂φ P, pc.w⟫ := by ring
  
  by_cases h₃ : ‖P‖ = 0
  · have h₄ : P = 0 := by
      by_contra h₄
      have h₅ : 0 < ‖P‖ := norm_pos_iff.mpr (by
        exact by simpa [h₄] using or_iff_not_imp_left.mpr (fun h₅ => h₅ h₄)

      linarith
    simp_all [h₄, inner_zero_right]

      apply h₂
      intro h₅
      apply h₃
      simp_all
    exact h₄
